weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 32 total findings, with 16 unique CVEs tracked, including CVE-2026-10829, CVE-2026-50656, and others, each observed only once. The most active day was June 17, 2026, with various security domains impacted, including AI/ML threats, cloud/IAM, containers/K8s, and others. The diversity of affected domains, such as crypto libraries, identity/auth, OS/kernel, and PyPI/Python, highlights the complexity of the current threat environment, while the limited frequency of each CVE suggests a broad but relatively shallow attack surface, with no single vulnerability dominating the landscape.
